issue_text_received: sir ye MC4 connector fir se kharab, copper wire bahar nikla hua hai, contact bilkul loose hai

perception.scene: Close-up of an MC4 electrical connector.

faults.evidence: Red wire and metal contact pin are pulled out of the plastic housing; bare copper strands are visible.

perception.summary: Confirmed worker report. The MC4 connector has suffered a mechanical failure, resulting in a loose connection and exposed copper wiring.

matched_record.description: String-3 MC4 pair showed heat discoloration and exposed copper conductor with poor contact; same location was flagged warm in March.
matched_record.resolution: Replaced male/female MC4 pair, re-crimped conductors, applied dielectric grease, torque-checked.

history_match.past_resolution: Replaced male/female MC4 pair, re-crimped conductors, applied dielectric grease, torque-checked.
history_match.recommendation: MC4 connector was previously repaired on this asset for a 'melted_connector' issue: 'Replaced male/female MC4 pair, re-crimped conductors, applied dielectric grease, torque-checked.'. Current fault is 'exposed_wiring' (high) — apply that proven remedy and check for a shared root cause. Recommended urgency: priority.
